title: Weskerson's 3D Items
description: Add some 3D charm to your Tools and Handhelds, while maintaining the original 2D sprites in your inventory! Now HMI compatible! (Formerly 3D Tools and Utils)
body:
![Affiliate Link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43493b07d4ff7c00ecdef4c91c9ba95bc0ceb940_0.webp)

![Pack Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abc5247109bfb42f55337f3cb60ffdbbd55e339b.png) ![Landing Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fab72d3ce0555978996b4c447e218f16b7d670f2.png) ![special thanks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/210cc8c6781ab76b68eda6481e3c551d5235521e.png) ### Special thanks to [Cyber](https://modrinth.com/user/cyber) and [Tixork](https://modrinth.com/user/tixork) for helping me get this pack to where it is today! _____________________________________________________________
![additional information](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30de559cc559e30922eaec6c907daf48349322d1.png)
Additional Information: - This pack requires versions 1.21.4 and above to work properly - In order to utilize this pack to the fullest, I highly recommend using [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) to get features such as eating animations for third person, proper lantern holding, etc.
### This pack is also compatible with the mod [Bucket'Em](https://modrinth.com/mod/bucketem), thanks to Pato for creating a compatibility pack utilizing Tools & Utils! Find the resource pack [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bucketem-remodeled) ![Bucket'Em](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4711ad8aa4817f6045cd3122c6464b784fef4af9.png)
_____________________________________________________________
![terms of use](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e49dca975d7080125a17335fd8ebfbca4293e487.png)
Terms of Use: **Terms and Conditions:** - By downloading or using this resource pack, you agree to follow these terms. - **Weskerson** is the original creator and rights holder of this resource pack. - These terms apply only if you plan to use this resource pack in publicly shared content. - The official Modrinth project page contains the most up-to-date terms, which take precedence over any other licenses, readme files, or terms included elsewhere, including within the resource pack itself. - If you incorporate assets from this resource pack into your own, proper credit must be given—ideally by crediting its name and linking to its official Modrinth page. - The creator has the final authority in determining how these terms apply to the use of this resource pack and its assets. - These terms are subject to change at any given time **With this resource pack, you may:** - You may modify this resource pack for personal use only, but you may not share modified versions publicly. - You are allowed to include this resource pack in a mod pack or server. - You can use this resource pack in content such as videos, live streams, or blog posts, as long as proper credit is given - You may use an edited version of this resource pack in videos, live streams, or blog posts, as long as the edited version is not shared publicly. - alter (remix, transform, build) the resource pack for use in your own, within reason, if proper credit is given **With this resource pack, you may not:** - You are not allowed to redistribute this resource pack. - You may not port this resource pack or its assets for use in Minecraft Bedrock Edition. - You cannot include unedited assets from this resource pack in your own resource pack. - You may not use assets from this resource pack in a paid product or behind a paywall.
